note: USD per 1M tokens. Estimates only: subscription users pay a flat plan, so dollars here are counterfactual metered cost, useful for COMPARING runs, not as a bill. Prices change; edit this file and update as_of. Claude rates below match the official rate card as of as_of. ORDER IS PRIORITY: the first entry whose 'match' is a substring of the model id wins, so keep the most specific pattern first (codex before gpt-5). File-level cache multipliers are Anthropic economics (reads 0.1x input; 5m write 1.25x, 1h write 2.0x input); a model entry may override them (OpenAI/Codex has no cache-write surcharge, so those set writes to 1.0x). Verify the OpenAI figures against the provider rate card before quoting Codex/GPT-5 dollars.
